title: Elysium Spa Spearmint & Peppermint Epsom Salts
features: MINT MADNESS: Elysium Spa Spearmint & Peppermint Epsom Salts, a blend of soothing, refreshing and invigorating fragrance. Each reselable pack contains 3 fragranced bath bombs

BUBBLE FREE : Prefer the perfect scented, silky water to relax into? Elysium Spa Epsom Salts are the perfect addition to your bath, easy to use, just add water, add the bath bomb, which will gently and release it's fragrance. Relax and enjoy.

100 PercentNATURAL: Elysium Spa Mint Madness Epsom Salts, magnesium sulphate, a pure mineral compound with a variety of uses. Generations of people have relied on its natural values, as it absorbs through the skin's surface to gently help support the removal of toxins.

THERAPEUTIC BATH: Elysium Spa Epsom Salts, whether soaking your feet or taking a bath in espsom salts, it will soothe muscle aches, relax the body and improve circulation. The Epsom Salts even treat sunburn. Adding epsom salts to a bath will help the relaxation of the body and mind to promote a restful night's sleep
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Elysium Spa Mint Madness, 100 PercentNatural Epsom Salts. Ready to use, resealable bag 450g

Elysium Spa Epsom Salts, whether soaking your feet or taking a bath in espsom salts, it will soothe muscle aches, relax the body and improve circulation. The Epsom Salts even treat sunburn. Adding epsom salts to a bath will help the relaxation of the body and mind to promote a restful night's sleep. Elysium Spa Mint Madness, 100 PercentNatural Epsom Salts. Ready to use, resealable bag 450g Ingredients Magnesium Sulphate, Parfum, Citral Directions Add approximately 2 handfuls to warm, running bath water for a wonderfully soothing & relaxing bath. Soak for at least 20 minutes to give the Elysium Spa Epsom Salts a chance to soften the skin and be absorbed. Safety Warning Caution: Keep out of reach of children. For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. If irritation occurs, discontinue use. See more
